name: paper-source
description: Paper Source (formerly EPI) discovers, acquires, parses, stages, approves, hands off, queries, and records academic paper source evidence for a Paper Wiki-compatible vault.

interface.shortDescription: v0.2.1 | Paper Source (formerly EPI): find, vet, parse, hand off to Paper Wiki, and record.
interface.longDescription: Paper Source, formerly EPI, packages a Codex workflow for profile-driven academic paper discovery, MCP-backed multi-source source coverage, provider-readiness-aware source routing, OA-first PDF acquisition with manual download cards when no direct PDF is available, lightweight PDF identity verification before MinerU, non-authoritative retrieval preview, source-first bundle preservation, MinerU parsing, bounded lifecycle cleanup, optional reader/critic review, low-burden reading reports, Chinese-first approval reports, Paper Wiki handoff, read-only formal graph wiki-ask, final-source-review recording, and proposal-based quality evolution. It derives search terms, venue prior, ranking, and wiki/reader emphasis from the user's config plus the current request, blocks incomplete or mismatched source bundles before final deposition, and prepares handoffs for Paper Wiki or another wiki-capable agent to write into the target Obsidian/LLM Wiki according to that vault's contract.
defaultPrompt: Set up Paper Source (formerly EPI) configuration.
Use PS / Paper Source to search and rank high-quality papers.
Prepare ranked papers through MinerU parse, source bundle audit, Chinese approval report, Paper Wiki handoff, and paper gate.
Ask read-only questions against the formal paper wiki graph with Paper Source wiki-ask fallback.
